headline: Horizon Quantum Announces Expected New Board Members and Chief Legal Officer
summary: SINGAPORE, March 09, 2026--Horizon Quantum Holdings Ltd. ("Horizon Quantum"), which will become the holding company of Horizon Quantum Computing Pte. Ltd., a pioneer of software infrastructure for quantum applications, today announced expected new members of its board of directors and a key addition to its leadership team.

headline: How Trump could use new AI chip export controls as 'leverage'
summary: Moor Insights & Strategy founder, CEO, and chief analyst Patrick Moorhead joins Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman to discuss potential new artificial intelligence (AI) chip export regulations, explaining how they would cause global supply uncertainty and affect chipmakers like AMD (AMD) and Nvidia (NVDA). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

content.title: How Trump could use new AI chip export controls as 'leverage'
content.description:
Moor Insights & Strategy founder, CEO, and chief analyst Patrick Moorhead joins Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman to discuss potential new artificial intelligence (AI) chip export regulations, explaining how they would cause global supply uncertainty and affect chipmakers like AMD (AMD) and Nvidia (NVDA).

To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.
